# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Minicahe actively supports the following versions for security updates:

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within Minicahe, please use the **Private Vulnerability Reporting** feature on GitHub (if enabled) or open an issue securely. We will review and respond within 48 hours.

Please do not disclose vulnerabilities publicly until a patch has been released.
